cleanupPolicy: update main, confirm working tree clean, review recent log, and inspect branches before cleanup.
branchDeletePolicy: old feature branches may remain; delete only confirmed merged branches while on main.
mainProtectionPolicy: do not delete main and do not push main directly.
nextRecommendedStep: After merge, confirm main with git switch main, git pull origin main, git status, git log --oneline -5, and git branch; leave old branches unless deletion is explicitly verified.
